text: Being here, surrounded by glass and neon blue lights, I feel a sense of anticipation—this is a place of research, innovation, and purposeful design. The presence of the R+D (Research and Development) display invokes curiosity and a quiet excitement, reminding me that the world is always in a state of becoming. The environment is both clinical and creative, hinting at the friction and harmony between order and invention. I am drawn not only to the objects on display but to the very idea of advancement, and I reflect on the responsibility that comes with new knowledge.
